why_tempus: Dr. Ruiz requested information regarding patient out-of-pocket exposure and the reimbursement pathway for comprehensive tissue profiling. I cannot provide information on these topics from the available product facts.
supporting_crm_excerpt: She asked for specifics on patient out-of-pocket exposure and the reimbursement pathway before considering a change.

objection_response.text: I understand that clarity on out-of-pocket costs and the reimbursement process is essential for your practice. I do not have access to approved product facts regarding pricing, payer coverage, or patient financial responsibility. I will route your inquiry to the appropriate Tempus team member who can provide the necessary information regarding our reimbursement support services.

meeting_script.text: Dr. Ruiz, thank you for meeting with me today to discuss your breast oncology practice. I understand you are looking for specific details regarding patient out-of-pocket exposure and the reimbursement pathway for comprehensive profiling. I do not have information on those topics in my current product materials. I would like to connect you with the right person at Tempus who can address these questions directly. May I facilitate that introduction for you this week?

abstention_reason: The supplied product facts do not contain information regarding patient out-of-pocket costs, reimbursement pathways, or financial coverage.
